name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans in Memphis, TN, with same-day cash for applications submitted by noon and approval for bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a physical branch in Memphis, Tennessee at 1473 S Trezevant St #23, functioning under the cartitleloansla.com platform. The company focuses on fast-turnaround secured lending and explicitly targets consumers who have been turned away by conventional lenders, with marketing that directly welcomes applicants with bad credit and prior bankruptcies on record. The office runs extended weekday hours from 9am to 7pm Monday through Friday and is open Saturday 10am to 5pm, giving it broader accessibility than many standard financial services offices.

Swift Title Loans provides car title loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, using the applicant's vehicle title as collateral. The lending process is structured in three steps: submit an online application, receive cash while continuing to drive the car, then repay the loan to recover the title. Customer reviews also reference personal loan products including unsecured options and bad-credit personal loans. The company's signature same-day funding promise — cash available for applications received before noon — is a central marketing claim that distinguishes it from lenders requiring multi-day processing.

A recurring differentiator at this branch is the consistent praise for a staff member named Alfred across more than ten independent reviews. Customers credit Alfred with patient explanations of loan terms, non-judgmental handling of applicants with credit difficulties, and thorough guidance through paperwork. The physical office is repeatedly described as welcoming, clean, and professionally run. Swift Title Loans also accepts applicants with documented prior bankruptcies, a step beyond bad-credit lenders that decline on score alone. Contact options include a toll-free phone line and a dedicated service email address.

Swift Title Loans fills a real gap for Memphis consumers who cannot access bank credit. However, this branch page publishes no APR, interest rate, repayment schedule, or fee information — a significant omission for any borrower doing cost comparisons. Car title loans as a product category typically carry very high effective interest rates, and default can result in vehicle repossession, which may worsen an already difficult financial situation. Customer reviews flag three meaningful service gaps: no mobile app for payment tracking, limited payment plan flexibility, and a lack of educational resources for first-time borrowers. Consumers should request a complete written disclosure of all costs and terms before signing.
address: 3013 Cathy St ste b, Orlando, FL 32839

company_info.headquarters: 3013 Cathy St ste b, Orlando, FL 32839

pros: Same-day cash available for applications submitted before noon
Explicitly accepts applicants with bad credit and prior bankruptcy on record
Loan range of $100 to $50,000 accommodates both small emergency needs and larger secured borrowing
Staff member Alfred receives consistent praise across 10+ reviews for clear, patient explanations
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) plus Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Borrower keeps and drives their car throughout the loan repayment period
In-person office described as welcoming, clean, and professionally run by multiple reviewers
cons: No APR, interest rate, fee, or repayment term disclosures published on the branch page
Title loans carry vehicle repossession risk in default — not addressed anywhere in site content
No mobile app for payment management, cited as a gap by multiple customers
Closed Sundays with no 24/7 digital account access
Parking at the location described as crowded, potentially inconvenient during peak hours
best_for: Memphis-area car owners who need fast cash and have bad credit or a prior bankruptcy
Borrowers who have been declined by banks and need same-day access to funds
Applicants seeking larger secured loan amounts ($2,000–$50,000) against a vehicle title
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance when navigating loan paperwork for the first time
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents who own a vehicle outright and need fast cash despite a poor credit history or prior bankruptcy, with the convenience of in-person service and same-day funding. The primary caveat is that car title loans carry high costs and vehicle repossession risk in default, and this branch publishes no APR or fee disclosures — borrowers must request full written cost terms before committing.
services: Same-day cash funding for applications submitted by noon
In-person loan processing and paperwork assistance
Loans for applicants with prior bankruptcy
Vehicle title-secured lending with car retention during repayment
